modules.name: mrd.tools.transform
documentation: Helpers for transforming data from k-space to image space and vice-versa.

functions.name: mrd.tools.transform.kspace_to_image
documentation:
Computes the Fourier transform from k-space to image space
along a given or all dimensions

```
param k

k-space data

param dim

vector of dimensions to transform

param img_shape

desired shape of output image

returns

data in image space (along transformed dimensions)
```

functions.name: mrd.tools.transform.image_to_kspace
documentation:
Computes the Fourier transform from image space to k-space space
along a given or all dimensions

```
param img

image space data

param dim

vector of dimensions to transform

param k_shape

desired shape of output k-space data

returns

data in k-space (along transformed dimensions)
```

modules.name: mrd.tools.simulation
documentation: Tools for generating coil sensitivities and phantoms

functions.name: mrd.tools.simulation.generate_shepp_logan_phantom
documentation: Generates a modified Shepp Logan phantom with improved contrast

functions.name: mrd.tools.simulation.generate_phantom
documentation:
Create a Shepp-Logan or modified Shepp-Logan phantom:

```
phantom (n = 256, phantom_type = 'Modified Shepp-Logan', ellipses = None)
```

# Parameters

matrix_size: int

: Size of imaging matrix in pixels

ellipses: list of PhantomEllipse

: Custom set of ellipses to use.

# Returns

np.ndarray

: Phantom image with shape (1, 1, matrix_size, matrix_size)

# Notes

The image bounding box in the algorithm is `[-1, -1], [1, 1]`,
so the values of `a`, `b`, `x0`, `y0` should all be specified with
respect to this box.

References:

Shepp, L. A.; Logan, B. F.; Reconstructing Interior Head Tissue
from X-Ray Transmissions, IEEE Transactions on Nuclear Science,
Feb. 1974, p. 232.

Toft, P.; "The Radon Transform - Theory and Implementation",
Ph.D. thesis, Department of Mathematical Modelling, Technical
University of Denmark, June 1996.

functions.name: mrd.tools.simulation.generate_birdcage_sensitivities
documentation:
Generates birdcage coil sensitivities.

This function is heavily inspired by the mri_birdcage.m Matlab script in
Jeff Fessler's IRT package: http://web.eecs.umich.edu/~fessler/code/

Parameters
----------
matrix_size: int
    Size of imaging matrix in pixels
ncoils: int
    Number of simulated coils
relative_radius: float, optional
    Relative radius of birdcage (default 1.5)

Returns
-------
np.ndarray
    Birdcage coil sensitivities with shape (ncoils, 1, matrix_size, matrix_size)

functions.name: mrd.tools.simulation.shepp_logan_ellipses
documentation: Standard head phantom, taken from Shepp & Logan

functions.name: mrd.tools.simulation.modified_shepp_logan_ellipses
documentation:
Modified version of Shepp & Logan's head phantom, adjusted to
improve contrast. Taken from Toft.

methods.name: mrd.tools.simulation.PhantomEllipse.__init__
documentation:
Construct a PhantomEllipse

Parameters
----------
A: float
    Additive intensity of the ellipse.
a: float
    Length of the major axis.
b: float
    Length of the minor axis.
x0: float
    Horizontal offset of the centre of the ellipse.
y0: float
    Vertical offset of the centre of the ellipse.
phi: float
    Counterclockwise rotation of the ellipse in degrees,
    measured as the angle between the horizontal axis and
    the ellipse major axis.

methods.name: mrd.tools.simulation.PhantomEllipse.is_inside
documentation: Determine whether an (x,y) coordinate is inside the ellipse

classes.name: mrd.yardl_types.Time

A basic time of day with nanosecond precision. It is not timezone-aware and is meant
to represent a wall clock time.

class_variables.name: mrd.types.EncodingCounters.set
documentation: Sets of different preparation, e.g. flow encoding, diffusion weighting

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.flags
documentation: A bit mask of common attributes applicable to individual acquisition

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.measurement_uid
documentation: Unique ID corresponding to the readout

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.acquisition_time_stamp
documentation: Clock time stamp (e.g. milliseconds since midnight)

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.physiology_time_stamp
documentation: Time stamps relative to physiological triggering

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.discard_pre
documentation:
Number of readout samples to be discarded at the beginning
(e.g. if the ADC is active during gradient events)

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.discard_post
documentation:
Number of readout samples to be discarded at the end
(e.g. if the ADC is active during gradient events)

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.center_sample
documentation: Index of the readout sample corresponing to k-space center (zero indexed)

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.encoding_space_ref
documentation: Indexed reference to the encoding spaces enumerated in the MRD Header

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.sample_time_us
documentation: Readout bandwidth, as time between samples in microseconds

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.position
documentation: Center of the excited volume, in LPS coordinates relative to isocenter in millimeters

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.slice_dir
documentation: Directional cosine of slice normal, i.e. cross-product of read_dir and phase_dir

class_variables.name: mrd.types.AcquisitionHeader.patient_table_position
documentation: Offset position of the patient table, in LPS coordinates

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.flags
documentation: A bit mask of common attributes applicable to individual images

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.measurement_uid
documentation: Unique ID corresponding to the image

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.field_of_view
documentation: Physical size (in mm) in each of the 3 dimensions in the image

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.position
documentation: Center of the excited volume, in LPS coordinates relative to isocenter in millimeters

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.slice_dir
documentation: Directional cosine of 3D phase encoding direction

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.patient_table_position
documentation: Offset position of the patient table, in LPS coordinates

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.set
documentation: Sets of different preparation, e.g. flow encoding, diffusion weighting

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.acquisition_time_stamp
documentation: Clock time stamp (e.g. milliseconds since midnight)

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.physiology_time_stamp
documentation: Time stamps relative to physiological triggering, e.g. ECG, pulse oximetry, respiratory

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.image_index
documentation: Image index number within a series of images, corresponding to DICOM InstanceNumber (0020,0013)

class_variables.name: mrd.types.ImageHeader.image_series_index
documentation: Series index, used to separate images into different series, corresponding to DICOM SeriesNumber (0020,0011)

class_variables.name: mrd.types.NoiseCovariance.sample_count
documentation: Number of samples used to compute matrix

class_variables.name: mrd.types.NoiseCovariance.matrix
documentation: Noise covariance matrix with dimensions [coil, coil]

class_variables.name: mrd.types.Waveform.flags
documentation: Bit field of flags. Currently unused

class_variables.name: mrd.types.Waveform.scan_counter
documentation: Number of the acquisition after this waveform

class_variables.name: mrd.types.Waveform.waveform_id
documentation: ID matching the waveform in the MRD header

classes.name: mrd.types.SamplingLimits
documentation: Sampled range along E0, E1, E2 (for asymmetric echo and partial fourier)
